title: Staff Accountant
description: KPMG is seeking a Staff Accountant to support our Boston office's accounting and audit services. Work fully remote while building your expertise in financial accounting and compliance. Join one of the Big Four accounting firms serving the world's leading organizations.
responsibilities: Perform audit procedures and financial statement analysis
Prepare accounting adjustments and journal entries
Develop and review working papers and audit documentation
Assist with client financial statement preparation and reviews
Support tax compliance and regulatory filings
Communicate with clients and team members on audit findings

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Accounting or Finance
skills: Attention to detail and regulatory compliance
Ability to work independently and in teams
certifications: CPA (Certified Public Accountant) or pursuing licensure

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
CPA exam and professional development support
Flexible work arrangements and career advancement
